source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/03_제품별 인증서 & 성적서/2. 제품별 성적서/05_Blue/4. Battery Recharger/2. EMC/KES-EM244554_DEPS126002_㈜에이치앤아비즈_IEC 55032,35_CELETTER.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: EU Declaration of Conformity for Battery Recharger model DEPS126002 under EMC Directive 2014/30/EU.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Documents conformity of the declared product with EMC Directive 2014/30/EU and listed EMC standards.
keyPoints: Applicant and manufacturer are H&abyz Co., Ltd.
Product name is Battery Recharger and base model is DEPS126002.
Listed standards include EN 55032, EN 55035, EN IEC 61000-3-2, and EN 61000-3-3.

concepts.name: EN 55032:2015/A11:2020
concepts.evidence: EN 55032:2015/A11:2020 Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of multimedia equipment

concepts.name: EN 55035:2017/A11:2020
concepts.evidence: EN 55035:2017/A11:2020 Electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment – Immunity requirements

concepts.name: EN IEC 61000-3-2:2019
concepts.evidence: EN IEC 61000-3-2:2019 Part 3-2: Limits - Limits for harmonic current emissions

concepts.name: EN 61000-3-3:2013/A2:2021
concepts.evidence: EN 61000-3-3:2013/A2:2021 Part 3-3: Limits - Limitation of voltage changes, voltage fluctuations and flicker

evidence.claim: The document is an EU Declaration of Conformity according to EMC Directive 2014/30/EU.
evidence.evidenceText: EU Declaration of Conformity According to EMC Directive 2014/30/EU

evidence.claim: The applicant is H&abyz Co., Ltd. in Republic of Korea.
evidence.evidenceText: Applicant's Name : H&abyz Co., Ltd. Applicant's Address : 41-16, Cheoinseong-ro, Namsa-eup, Cheoin-gu, Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do, Republic of Korea

evidence.claim: The manufacturer is H&abyz Co., Ltd. in Republic of Korea.
evidence.evidenceText: Manufacturer's Name : H&abyz Co., Ltd. Manufacturer's Address : 41-16, Cheoinseong-ro, Namsa-eup, Cheoin-gu, Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do, Republic of Korea

evidence.claim: The declared product is Battery Recharger base model DEPS126002.
evidence.evidenceText: Product Name : Battery Recharger Base Model : DEPS126002 Variant Model : -

evidence.claim: The declaration was issued in Korea on 01. 22. 2025.
Directive 2014/30/EU concerns electromagnetic compatibility harmonisation in EU Member States.
evidence.evidenceText: 2014/30/EU Directive 2014/30/EU of the European Parliament and of the Council of 26 February 2014 on the harmonisation of the laws of the Member States relating to electromagnetic compatibility

evidence.claim: EN 55032:2015/A11:2020 is listed for radio disturbance characteristics of multimedia equipment.
evidence.evidenceText: EN 55032:2015/A11:2020 Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of multimedia equipment

evidence.claim: EN 55035:2017/A11:2020 is listed for multimedia equipment immunity requirements.
evidence.evidenceText: EN 55035:2017/A11:2020 Electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment – Immunity requirements

evidence.claim: EN IEC 61000-3-2:2019 is listed for harmonic current emission limits.
evidence.evidenceText: EN IEC 61000-3-2:2019 Part 3-2: Limits - Limits for harmonic current emissions (equipment input current ≤ 16 A per phase)

evidence.claim: EN 61000-3-3:2013/A2:2021 is listed for voltage changes, voltage fluctuations and flicker limits.
evidence.evidenceText: EN 61000-3-3:2013/A2:2021 Part 3-3: Limits - Limitation of voltage changes, voltage fluctuations and flicker in public low-voltage supply systems
